overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a Slytherin student exploring the dimly lit common room with stone arches and fireplace, then proceeding through a narrow tunnel to emerge into a grand hall with an ornate staircase and glass dome ceiling.

scene_state.functional_zone: Slytherin common room with seating and fireplace

events.description: character stops near the fireplace and looks around

agents.ego_description: walking through the common room toward the fireplace, observing the furniture and surroundings

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning fire and wooden mantelpiece
upholstered sofa with curved wooden frame
wooden four-poster bed with green draped curtains
wooden octagonal table with wizard chess set
high vaulted stone ceiling with ribbed arches

segments.scene_description: The character explores the Slytherin common room, walking past a chess table and leather sofa toward a large stone fireplace. The space features gothic stone arches, ornate carpets, and a four-poster bed in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: common room rear area leading to tunnel

events.description: character enters the narrow stone tunnel from the common room

agents.ego_description: walking away from the fireplace area toward the tunnel exit at the back of the room

entered.detail: dark wooden desk with papers and books
tall stacks of books piled against the wall
arched stone doorway leading to a narrow corridor

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the central seating area, the character passes a writing desk and stacks of books toward a stone archway. The lighting becomes dimmer as the character approaches and enters the narrow tunnel entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved stone tunnel with book stacks

events.description: character opens the ornate wooden door at the tunnel's end

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit curved tunnel toward the exit door

entered.detail: tall wooden door with metal scrollwork and glass panels

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds through the narrow stone tunnel lined with book stacks, approaching an ornate wooden door at the corridor's end. The space is enclosed with curved stone walls and minimal lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand entrance hall with double staircase and glass dome

events.description: character enters the grand hall revealing the massive staircase and glass dome
character pauses to look up at the glass dome ceiling
character begins descending the grand staircase

agents.ego_description: entering the grand hall, pausing to admire the glass dome overhead, then descending the staircase

entered.detail: sweeping double staircase with stone balustrades leading upward
large ornate glass dome ceiling with iron framework showing overcast sky
stone balcony with carved railing overlooking the hall
magical floating candle lanterns illuminating the space

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel, the character enters a magnificent grand hall dominated by a sweeping double staircase and a massive glass dome ceiling. The character pauses to look up at the dome before beginning the descent down the stairs, passing floating lanterns and ornate stone balustrades.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate, dimly lit depths of the Slytherin common room into the vast, airy expanse of a grand hall. It begins by gliding past a chess table and leather sofa toward a large stone fireplace, surrounded by gothic arches and ornate carpets. As the character moves away from the central seating area, the scene shifts past a writing desk and stacks of books, with the lighting dimming as the camera enters a narrow, enclosed stone tunnel. The perspective then proceeds through this curved corridor lined with books before passing through an ornate wooden door. Finally, the space opens dramatically into a magnificent hall dominated by a sweeping double staircase and a massive glass dome ceiling, where the camera pauses to look upward before descending past floating lanterns.
